backbones.default: a single {subject}, one isolated stylized game item floating in empty space, anime cel shaded hand-painted style, smooth simplified toony shapes with a clean readable silhouette, soft painted shading with two or three tonal steps per surface and gentle painted highlights, evenly lit from all sides so it casts no shadow anywhere, matte with no gloss, nothing glowing, no white outline, no pale rim stroke around the silhouette, no drop shadow, no cast shadow, no photographic detail, {orient}, suspended with nothing beneath it, the whole item complete and uncropped as one connected piece, filling most of the frame, centered on a plain uniform flat light-grey backdrop, no ground, no surface, no horizon, no vignette, no text, no hands, no characters
backbones.glow: a single {subject}, one isolated stylized game item floating in empty space, anime cel shaded hand-painted style, smooth simplified toony shapes with a clean readable silhouette, soft painted shading with two or three tonal steps per surface and gentle painted highlights, evenly lit from all sides so it casts no shadow anywhere, matte with no gloss everywhere except the fire, the flame the only glowing element with its warm light kept soft and contained, no white outline, no pale rim stroke around the silhouette, no drop shadow, no cast shadow, no photographic detail, {orient}, suspended with nothing beneath it, the whole item complete and uncropped as one connected piece, filling most of the frame, centered on a plain uniform flat light-grey backdrop, no ground, no surface, no horizon, no vignette, no text, no hands, no characters
backbones.cluster: a single {subject}, one isolated stylized game item pile floating in empty space, anime cel shaded hand-painted style, smooth simplified toony shapes with a clean readable silhouette, soft painted shading with two or three tonal steps per surface and gentle painted highlights, evenly lit from all sides so it casts no shadow anywhere, matte with no gloss, nothing glowing, no white outline, no pale rim stroke around the silhouette, no drop shadow, no cast shadow, no photographic detail, {orient}, suspended with nothing beneath it, the whole subject complete and uncropped, gathered into one tight compact cluster, filling most of the frame, centered on a plain uniform flat light-grey backdrop, no ground, no surface, no horizon, no vignette, no text, no hands, no characters

generic.title: Generic held bundle
generic.note: The one NEW viewmodel mesh of this batch: it replaces the procedural bag cuboid every mesh-less equipable item shows in the hand. Judge it as a 3D prop first, icon never ships from it.

held.title: Hand-held items (pick = icon AND mesh reference)
held.note: Each pick becomes both the inventory icon and the image-to-3D reference for a real held model, exactly like the five gathering tools. The bow, crossbow and bandage animate in-hand, so their meshes will need extra handling at build time; judge the look, not the rigging.

deployable_icon.title: Deployables (icon only)
deployable_icon.note: The placed world models already exist and stay. The pick becomes the new inventory icon; in the hand these items will carry the generic bundle above.

material_icon.title: Materials (icon only)
material_icon.note: Raw materials never reach a hand, so the pick is purely the new inventory icon.

armor_icon.title: Armor (icon only)
armor_icon.note: Worn rig models already exist and stay on the PBR family. The pick becomes the new inventory / paperdoll icon.

items.label: Generic Held Bundle
items.orient: floating at a slightly raised three-quarter angle so its front and one side both show
items.subject: plump rough burlap cloth sack bundle, warm grey-tan sacking gathered at the top and tied off with a short loop of tan twine, a small knotted tail of cloth sticking up above the tie, the body gently lumpy as if packed with gear

prompts.label: classic sack
prompts.extra: The archetypal carried sack: a rounded body a little wider at the base, soft painted weave texture, one or two gentle creases, a neat twine tie.

prompts.label: chunky stuffed
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a fat overstuffed body bulging with vague angular lumps of unseen gear, a tight twine tie squeezing the neck, a short flared cloth tail.

prompts.label: worn patched
prompts.extra: Survival-made feel: a squarish stitched patch on the body, visible seam stitching, a frayed cloth tail above a messy double-wrapped twine tie.

prompts.label: sleek satchel
prompts.extra: A tidier carry bundle: smoother canvas-like cloth, a single clean diagonal crease, a slim cord tie finished with a small knot.

items.label: Hammer
items.orient: floating diagonally with the head at the upper left and the handle running down to the lower right
items.subject: sturdy wooden construction mallet, a thick cylindrical warm brown wooden head bound by two forged dark blue-grey iron band hoops near each striking face, mounted crosswise on a straight warm brown wooden handle

prompts.label: classic mallet
prompts.extra: The archetypal builder's mallet: a barrel-shaped head with flat striking faces, two neat iron hoops, a straight handle with a subtle pommel swell, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky mallet
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a huge oversized head dwarfing the handle, broad iron hoops, a stout handle with a flared pommel, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn mallet
prompts.extra: Work-worn: dents and small splits on the striking faces, one hoop slightly askew, a cord-wrapped grip band on the handle, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: sleek mallet
prompts.extra: A refined joiner's mallet: a gently tapered head, slim tidy iron hoops, a slender handle widening at the pommel, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Building Plan
items.orient: floating diagonally, the rolled scroll running from the upper left down to the lower right
items.subject: rolled parchment scroll, cream paper wound in a tight roll with a loose outer flap curling open at one end, tied around the middle with thin brown twine

prompts.label: classic scroll
prompts.extra: A clean tight roll, the outer flap curling open just enough to hint at faint blue plan linework inside, one neat twine tie, soft cream paper tones.

prompts.label: chunky scroll
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a fat plump roll with big spiral ends, a broad twine tie, the flap curling in one bold sweep, warm cream paper.

prompts.label: worn scroll
prompts.extra: Field-used: dog-eared flap corners, a small tear at the edge, uneven roll ends, a messy double-wrapped twine tie, slightly darkened parchment.

prompts.label: sealed scroll
prompts.extra: A tidier document: a crisp even roll closed with a small dark red wax seal on the twine, clean pale cream paper, fine painted edge lines on the roll ends.

items.label: Wooden Club
items.orient: floating diagonally with the head at the upper left and the handle running down to the lower right
items.subject: crude wooden war club carved from one piece of warm brown hardwood, a thick gnarly knotted striking head full of carved character swelling from a narrower straight grip wrapped in tan cord

prompts.label: knotted brute
prompts.extra: The head covered in blunt carved wooden knots and knobs standing proud like a rough cudgel, deep painted wood grain, a cord-wrapped grip with a flared pommel.

prompts.label: studded club
prompts.extra: Short dark iron studs hammered in rings around the wooden head, visible wood grain between them, a neat cord-wrapped grip, a small iron pommel cap.

prompts.label: root cudgel
prompts.extra: The head is the natural root burl of the branch: gnarled, asymmetric, full of lumps and bark remnants, survival-made feel, messy cord wrap on the grip.

prompts.label: carved warclub
prompts.extra: A shaped rectangular-profile warclub head with carved edge ridges and chip-carved notch rows, an elegant taper into the wrapped grip, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Stone Spear
items.orient: floating diagonally with the stone point at the upper left and the shaft running down to the lower right
items.subject: primitive hunting spear, a long straight warm brown wooden shaft tipped with a leaf-shaped point knapped from rough dull matte grey stone, the point showing visible chipped knapping scallops and a grainy unpolished rock texture, absolutely not metal, no smooth faces, no shine, lashed onto the split shaft end with criss-crossed tan cord

prompts.label: classic spear
prompts.extra: EVERY part of the stone point is the same dull matte medium-grey with no pale rim and no sheen, because stone does not shine like iron. A clean leaf-shaped point, neat criss-cross lashing, a straight smooth shaft, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky spear
prompts.extra: EVERY part of the stone point is the same dull matte medium-grey with no pale rim and no sheen. Cartoon proportions: a broad oversized point with bold chip facets, heavy rope lashing, a thick shaft, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn spear
prompts.extra: EVERY part of the stone point is the same dull matte medium-grey with no pale rim and no sheen. Survival-made: an uneven chipped point, messy layered lashing, a slightly crooked shaft with bark patches, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: sleek spear
prompts.extra: EVERY part of the stone point is the same dull matte medium-grey with no pale rim and no sheen. A refined thrown-spear look: a long slender point, tight minimal lashing, a smooth tapered shaft with a small butt cap of wrapped cord.

items.label: Iron Sword
items.orient: floating diagonally with the blade tip at the upper left and the grip at the lower right
items.subject: forged iron sword with real presence, a BROAD straight dark blue-grey steel blade with a strong bright honed edge on each side and a deep dark fuller groove down the centre, a sturdy dark iron crossguard with weight to it, a warm brown leather-wrapped grip ending in a heavy round iron pommel

prompts.label: broad arming
prompts.extra: A wide confident blade tapering to a strong point, bold contrast between the dark flat and the bright edges, a thick straight crossguard, a chunky disc pommel.

prompts.label: heavy falchion
prompts.extra: A SINGLE-EDGED falchion: the blade shaped like a broad machete or cleaver, its straight thick dark spine on one side and the bright sweeping cutting edge on the other, widening toward a clipped angled tip, a short stout crossguard, a curved grip.

prompts.label: anime greatsword
prompts.extra: Exaggerated heroic anime proportions: the blade almost as wide as a plank and clearly LONGER and BIGGER than a normal sword, a dramatic bright edge band, a bold dark fuller, a wide sweeping winged crossguard, a long two-hand wrapped grip with a heavy pommel.

prompts.label: worn veteran
prompts.extra: A broad blade with two or three honest edge notches and faint hammer marks on the flat, a brass-pinned crossguard, a leather grip polished by use, a scarred pommel.

items.label: Wooden Bow
items.orient: floating upright with a slight diagonal tilt, the curved wooden belly of the bow on the left and the taut string on the right
items.subject: simple wooden hunting bow, one smoothly curved stave of warm brown wood, thickest at the wrapped grip in the middle and tapering toward each nocked tip, strung with a single taut pale tan cord running straight between the tips

prompts.label: classic longbow
prompts.extra: The archetypal longbow: one clean shallow D-curve, a cord-wrapped grip section, small notched tips, the string perfectly straight and taut, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky recurve
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a thick bold stave with exaggerated curled-back recurve tips, a broad wrapped grip, a heavy pale string, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn bow
prompts.extra: Survival-made: an uneven hand-shaved stave with bark patches near the tips, a messy cord-wrapped grip, a slightly frayed string, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: sleek recurve
prompts.extra: A refined recurve: an elegant double-curve profile, a slim leather grip wrap, fine tapered tips with neat string nocks, a thin crisp string, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Crossbow
items.orient: floating diagonally seen from slightly above, the bow at the upper left and the tiller butt at the lower right
items.subject: historical medieval hunting crossbow, a thick straight warm brown wooden tiller beam with a shallow bolt groove along its top, a short WIDE bow fixed crosswise at the muzzle end with its two stiff limbs sweeping slightly back, a taut pale tan cord strung between the limb tips, a small iron stirrup loop at the very front for cocking, forged dark blue-grey iron bindings, an ancient hand-made weapon, not a rifle, not a gun, no barrel, no bolt handle, no scope

prompts.label: classic crossbow
prompts.extra: The archetypal medieval crossbow: a plain straight tiller with a shallow bolt groove on top, the wide bow clearly crossing it at the front, a taut straight string, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky crossbow
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a thick heavy tiller, an oversized bold bow crossing at the front, broad riveted iron bindings, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn crossbow
prompts.extra: Seen from the same slightly-above angle as a museum photograph: the short wide bow clearly crossing the tiller near the front, field-worn with scuffed iron bindings, a cord-whipped repair wrap on one bow limb, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: sleek crossbow
prompts.extra: A refined medieval crossbow with a slim elegant tiller and fine tapered bow limbs clearly crossing at the front, tidy inset iron bindings, a thin crisp string, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Arrow
items.orient: floating diagonally with the stone tip at the upper left and the feather fletching at the lower right
items.subject: single arrow, a long straight warm brown wooden shaft tipped with a small knapped dull matte grey stone head lashed on with thin tan cord, twin pale feather fletchings and a small string nock at the rear end

prompts.label: classic arrow
prompts.extra: EVERY part of the stone head is the same dull matte medium-grey with no pale rim and no sheen. A clean straight shaft, a neat compact point, tidy paired cream feather fletchings, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky arrow
prompts.extra: EVERY part of the stone head is the same dull matte medium-grey with no pale rim and no sheen. Cartoon proportions: a broad oversized head, a thick shaft, big bold fletching vanes, heavy lashing, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn arrow
prompts.extra: EVERY part of the stone head is the same dull matte medium-grey with no pale rim and no sheen. Survival-made: a slightly uneven shaft, a chipped point, ragged mismatched fletching feathers, messy lashing, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: banded arrow
prompts.extra: EVERY part of the stone head is the same dull matte medium-grey with no pale rim and no sheen. A fletcher's arrow: a slender shaft with a thin painted band near the nock, fine tapered point, crisp fletchings with subtle darker barred stripes.

items.label: Powder Bomb
items.orient: floating centered, seen from a slightly raised angle, the fuse pointing up and to the left
items.subject: round thrown powder bomb, a fist-sized ball wrapped tight in undyed beige cloth with the wrapping folds converging at the top, criss-crossed with thin tan cord, topped by a small dark iron fuse cap holding a short braided fuse

prompts.label: classic bomb
prompts.extra: The archetypal cloth bomb: a clean round ball, neat converging wrap folds, a tidy criss-cross cord net, a small riveted cap and a short kinked fuse.

prompts.label: chunky bomb
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a fat slightly squashed ball, bold thick cord in a wide net, an oversized cap and a fat curly fuse, exaggerated wrap folds.

prompts.label: worn bomb
prompts.extra: Backyard-made: a lumpy uneven ball, a squarish stitched patch, loose cord ends dangling, a scuffed cap and a frayed fuse tip.

prompts.label: sleek bomb
prompts.extra: A tidier charge: a smooth even sphere, minimal fine cordwork, a neat collar-shaped cap with a clean coiled fuse, subtle painted cloth weave.

items.label: Powder Keg
items.orient: standing upright, floating at a slightly raised three-quarter angle so its front and one side both show
items.subject: small wooden powder keg, a staved warm brown barrel bound by two forged dark blue-grey iron hoops, a short braided fuse rising from a small bung hole in the flat top

prompts.label: classic keg
prompts.extra: The archetypal powder keg: evenly curved staves with visible seams, two neat iron hoops, a flat top with a small dark bung, a short kinked fuse, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky keg
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a fat squat barrel bulging in the middle, broad bold hoops, an oversized fuse curling up from the top, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn keg
prompts.extra: Field-worn: one hoop sitting slightly crooked, a split stave with a cord repair wrap, scuffed edges, a frayed fuse, a faint dusting of dark powder around the bung, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: sleek keg
prompts.extra: A cooper's tidy keg: a taller slender barrel, slim tidy hoops with rivet dots, a neat coiled fuse, clean straight stave lines, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Satchel Charge
items.orient: floating upright shown straight from the front, the shoulder strap draping behind it
items.subject: satchel explosive charge, a bulging rectangular undyed beige canvas pack with a fold-over flap cinched shut by two warm brown leather straps and dark iron buckles, a short braided fuse sticking out from under the flap, a wide leather shoulder strap

prompts.label: classic satchel
prompts.extra: The archetypal satchel charge: a plump squared pack, two neat straps with small buckles, a short kinked fuse at one top corner, soft painted canvas weave.

prompts.label: chunky satchel
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: an overstuffed bulging pack with vague cylindrical lumps pressing through the canvas, thick bold straps, an oversized buckle and a fat curly fuse.

prompts.label: worn satchel
prompts.extra: Improvised feel: a stitched patch on the flap, one strap tied off in a knot where the buckle is missing, frayed canvas corners, a ragged fuse.

prompts.label: sleek satchel
prompts.extra: A tidier demolition pack: a crisp squared silhouette, slim neat straps with tidy buckles, a clean coiled fuse tucked under the flap edge, fine stitched seams.

items.label: Bandage
items.orient: floating centered, the roll at the upper left and the loose tail unrolling toward the lower right
items.subject: rolled linen bandage, a plump off-white cloth roll with a visible spiral on its end face, a loose tail of cloth unrolling from the bottom of the roll and gently curling at its tip

prompts.label: classic roll
prompts.extra: The archetypal bandage: a clean tight roll with a soft spiral end, a smooth ribbon tail with one gentle S-curve, soft warm off-white linen tones.

prompts.label: chunky roll
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a fat plump roll with a bold spiral, a wide short tail flipping up at the tip, thick soft cloth edges.

prompts.label: worn homespun
prompts.extra: Homespun feel: a slightly loose uneven roll, frayed tail edges with loose thread ends, a faint woven texture, warm unbleached linen tone.

prompts.label: sleek pinned
prompts.extra: A tidy field dressing: a crisp even roll secured by a tiny dark metal pin clasp, a slim neat tail with clean edges, pale clean linen.

items.label: Workbench (Tier 1)
items.orient: floating at a slightly raised three-quarter angle so its top and front both show
items.subject: sturdy crude wooden workbench, a thick warm brown plank top on four stout squared legs joined by a lower shelf brace, built from rough hewn timber with visible joints

prompts.label: classic bench
prompts.extra: The archetypal crafting bench: a heavy two-plank top with a visible seam, honest chunky joinery pegs at the corners, an empty lower shelf, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky bench
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: an extra thick slab top with rounded edges, fat stubby legs, oversized joinery pegs, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn bench
prompts.extra: Well-used: scattered cut marks and dents on the top, a darker worn patch in the middle, one slightly crooked leg brace, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: sleek bench
prompts.extra: A joiner's tidy bench: a smooth even top with a bevelled front edge, slender tapered legs, a neat full-width lower shelf, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Workbench (Tier 2)
items.orient: floating at a slightly raised three-quarter angle so its top and front both show
items.subject: heavy reinforced crafting workbench built as one SOLID mass: a thick warm brown slab top with riveted dark blue-grey iron edge plates and corner caps, standing on a CLOSED solid plank base cabinet that reaches the ground on every side, no open legs, no gaps under the top, clean simple silhouette

prompts.label: solid cabinet
prompts.extra: The archetypal upgraded bench: a clean slab top with tidy iron edging, a closed base cabinet with a single plank door and iron hinges, one unbroken volume, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky solid
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: an extra thick top with bold riveted iron caps, a fat closed base with wide planks, big friendly rivets, one unbroken volume, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn solid
prompts.extra: Forge-worn: hammer dents in the top, scuffed bright edges on the iron plates, a soot-darkened patch, a closed base with one replaced lighter plank, one unbroken volume, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: vice solid
prompts.extra: The solid cabinet bench with a compact iron vice mounted flush on one end of the top edge, tidy iron edging, a closed plank base, one unbroken volume, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Crude Furnace
items.orient: floating at a slightly raised three-quarter angle so its front and one side both show
items.subject: squat crude smelting furnace built as ONE SOLID MASS of large flat-faced rough-hewn stone blocks mortared in even courses, a clean simple silhouette with no loose stones and no round boulders, a dark arched mouth at the base filled with warm orange firelight, a short thick square chimney on top

prompts.label: block kiln
prompts.extra: EVERY stone is the same dull matte grey with no sheen. Even courses of big rectangular blocks, a neat arched mouth with a stone lintel, a stout square chimney, the whole furnace one solid unbroken volume.

prompts.label: clay kiln
prompts.extra: Built instead as a SOLID smooth packed-clay beehive kiln: one continuous matte earthen surface with rounded shoulders, a small arched mouth glowing warmly, a short clay chimney, zero visible stones.

prompts.label: square forge
prompts.extra: EVERY stone is the same dull matte grey with no sheen. A blocky rectangular furnace like a mason's forge: straight vertical walls of large flat blocks, a wide square mouth with a thick lintel, a chunky rectangular chimney.

prompts.label: worn block kiln
prompts.extra: EVERY stone is the same dull matte grey with no sheen. The block kiln long-fired: a soot streak fanning up from the mouth, two chipped block corners, ember flecks in the glow, still one solid unbroken volume.

items.label: Hewn Log Door
items.orient: floating upright shown straight from the front
items.subject: heavy rectangular door built of vertical squared hewn warm brown timber planks, two horizontal cross battens pegged across them, two dark blue-grey iron hinge straps reaching in from one side, a simple iron ring handle on the other

prompts.label: classic door
prompts.extra: The archetypal timber door: even plank widths with visible seams, straight battens with peg dots, neat tapered hinge straps, a round ring handle, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky door
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: extra wide chunky planks, fat rounded battens, bold oversized hinge straps with big rivets, a heavy ring handle, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn door
prompts.extra: Frontier-worn: uneven plank ends at the bottom edge, a knothole, scuffed batten corners, slightly rusted hinge straps, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: sleek door
prompts.extra: A carpenter's tidy door: evenly matched planks with chamfered seams, slim elegant hinge straps ending in leaf-shaped finials, a neat latch plate under the handle, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Iron Door
items.orient: floating upright shown straight from the front
items.subject: heavy rectangular forged iron door, dark blue-grey riveted iron plates with two thick horizontal reinforcement bands, a narrow barred peep slot near the top, a sturdy iron handle on one side

prompts.label: classic iron
prompts.extra: The archetypal vault-like door: clean plate seams with rows of rivet dots, two bold bands, a small barred slot, brighter worn edges on the bands, a solid handle.

prompts.label: chunky iron
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: fat bulging plates, oversized dome rivets, extra thick bands, a big blocky handle, bold panel seams.

prompts.label: worn iron
prompts.extra: Siege-worn: shallow dents in the plates, scuffed bright streaks along the band edges, faint rust blooms around the lower rivets, a scratched handle.

prompts.label: sleek iron
prompts.extra: A master smith's door: slim tidy bands, fine even rivet rows, a neatly framed peep slot with slender bars, a refined curved handle, crisp plate lines.

items.label: Window Shutter
items.orient: floating upright shown straight from the front
items.subject: square wooden window shutter panel of vertical warm brown planks held by a single diagonal cross batten, two small dark blue-grey iron hinge straps along one side, a small wooden turn latch on the other

prompts.label: classic shutter
prompts.extra: The archetypal shutter: even planks, one clean diagonal batten with peg dots, neat little hinge straps, a simple turn latch, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky shutter
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: wide chunky planks with rounded edges, a fat bold batten, oversized hinge straps, a big friendly turn latch, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn shutter
prompts.extra: Weathered: sun-faded streaks on the planks, a small knothole, one plank end slightly proud of the rest, scuffed hinges, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: sleek shutter
prompts.extra: A joiner's shutter: matched planks with chamfered seams, a slim elegant Z-brace instead of the single diagonal, tidy hinge straps, a neat carved latch, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Sleeping Bag
items.orient: floating at a slightly raised three-quarter angle so its top surface reads clearly
items.subject: simple camp sleeping bag laid out flat, a slightly puffy quilted top of undyed beige canvas with wide horizontal quilt channels, a rolled headrest bump at the top end, plain stitched edging all round

prompts.label: classic bag
prompts.extra: The archetypal bedroll bag: a soft rounded rectangle, three or four gentle quilt channels, a plump headrest roll, soft painted canvas weave.

prompts.label: chunky bag
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: an extra puffy marshmallow-like bag with deep pinched quilt seams, a fat headrest roll, bold rounded corners.

prompts.label: rolled bedroll
prompts.extra: Shown instead as the packed form: the same bag rolled up tight into a cylinder and cinched with two cord ties, the spiral visible on the end face, a small carry loop.

prompts.label: mossy bag
prompts.extra: The same laid-out bag in a muted moss-green canvas with warm tan edging and ties, gentle quilt channels, a tidy headrest roll.

items.label: Torch
items.orient: floating diagonally with the flaming head at the upper left and the handle running down to the lower right
items.subject: handheld torch, a stout warm brown wooden stick whose top end is wrapped in undyed cloth bound with criss-crossed tan cord, a lively warm orange and yellow flame rising from the wrapped head

prompts.label: classic torch
prompts.extra: The archetypal torch: a neat cloth wrap, a teardrop flame with two or three painted tongue shapes and a brighter yellow core, a straight stick with mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky torch
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a fat bold flame with big lapping tongues, a thick chunky wrap, a stout stick with a flared end, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn torch
prompts.extra: Half-burned: the top of the wrap charred black, ragged wrap edges, a smaller tired flame with a drifting spark, a scuffed stick, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: sleek torch
prompts.extra: A tidy lantern-substitute: a neat tapered wrap with even cord bands, a tall elegant single-tongue flame with a clean bright core, a slim smooth stick, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Small Storage Box
items.orient: floating at a slightly raised three-quarter angle so its front and one side both show
items.subject: small wooden storage chest built as one SOLID closed box: flat planked sides identical on every face, a gently domed hinged lid, dark blue-grey iron corner brackets and a small iron hasp on the front, every side fully closed with no holes and no missing planks

prompts.label: classic solid
prompts.extra: Clean plank seams all around, four neat corner brackets with rivet dots, a small hasp, a thin lid lip, one unbroken volume, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky solid
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a squat rounded chest with fat plank edges, bold oversized brackets, a big friendly hasp, one unbroken volume, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: banded solid
prompts.extra: Two slim iron bands wrapping fully around body and lid instead of corner brackets, a neat hasp, clean seams, one unbroken volume, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn solid
prompts.extra: Well-travelled but intact: scuffed lid corners, faint rust at the hasp, one darker replaced plank, every side still fully closed, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Large Storage Box
items.orient: floating at a slightly raised three-quarter angle so its front and one side both show
items.subject: large long wooden storage chest, thick warm brown planks with a flat hinged lid, two broad dark blue-grey iron bands wrapping vertically around the body and lid, a heavy iron hasp latch on the front

prompts.label: classic chest
prompts.extra: The archetypal big chest: a long low body, two clean iron bands with rivet dots, a heavy hasp, straight plank seams, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky chest
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a fat deep body with bulging plank edges, extra broad bands with dome rivets, an oversized hasp, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn chest
prompts.extra: Loot-worn: scuffed band edges showing brighter metal, a dented lid corner, a scratched hasp, one darker replaced plank, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: sleek chest
prompts.extra: A shipwright's chest: slim tidy bands, fine rivet rows, chamfered plank seams, a neat hasp with a small ring pull, a gently crowned lid, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Tool Cupboard
items.orient: floating at a slightly raised three-quarter angle so its front and one side both show
items.subject: tall narrow wooden cupboard cabinet standing upright, two vertical warm brown plank doors with dark blue-grey iron hinge straps, a small central latch, a slightly overhanging flat top board

prompts.label: classic cupboard
prompts.extra: The archetypal claim cupboard: two even doors with a clean centre seam, tapered hinge straps, a small hasp latch, a plain plinth base, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: chunky cupboard
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a stout wide-shouldered cabinet, fat plank doors, bold oversized hinge straps and latch, a thick overhanging top, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: worn cupboard
prompts.extra: Base-worn: scuffed door corners, a knothole in one door, slightly rusted hinge straps, a faint gap at the centre seam, mild painted wood grain.

prompts.label: sleek cupboard
prompts.extra: A cabinetmaker's piece: matched door planks with chamfered seams, slim elegant hinge straps with leaf finials, a neat turned latch knob, a bevelled top, mild painted wood grain.

items.label: Salvage Chest
items.orient: floating at a slightly raised three-quarter angle so its front and one side both show
items.subject: small knee-height chest of charred blackened wood planks, banded with rough dark iron straps, a heavy scuffed iron hasp on the front, ash-grey weathering dusting the charred surfaces

prompts.label: classic salvage
prompts.extra: The archetypal burnt survivor: charcoal-dark planks with faint warm brown showing through at worn edges, two rough bands, a heavy hasp, subtle ash dusting.

prompts.label: chunky salvage
prompts.extra: Cartoon proportions: a squat rounded chest with fat charred planks, bold bent bands with big rivets, an oversized hasp hanging slightly open.

prompts.label: worn salvage
prompts.extra: Fire-ravaged: deeply cracked alligator-char texture on the planks, one band snapped and curling away, a rust-streaked hasp, ash flakes at the edges.

prompts.label: sturdy salvage
prompts.extra: The best-preserved find: mostly intact planks scorched only at the corners, straight tidy bands, a solid working hasp with a ring pull, light ash dusting.

items.label: Wood

prompts.label: chunky stack

prompts.label: split billets

items.label: Stone

prompts.label: chunky cluster

prompts.label: sharp rubble

prompts.label: chunky cluster

prompts.label: fine rubble

notes: Batch 2 (2026-07-19): everything except the five shipped gathering tools (their round lives in prompts_tools_shipped.json and candidates/shipped/). Schema changes vs the tool round: item-level subject shared by all four variants (variant-level subject still overrides if present), per-item orient string injected into the backbone, three backbones (default / glow for the two fire items / cluster for pile-shaped materials, which relaxes the one-connected-piece guard), and per-item group + label driving the grouped picker. Groups: generic (the burlap bundle replacing the procedural bag viewmodel, mesh-bound), held (icon + mesh reference, like the tools), deployable_icon / material_icon / armor_icon (icon only, no mesh). Prompt lessons carried over from the tool round: floating + evenly lit (never lying, kills painted shadows), one connected piece, dull-matte-stone constant wherever stone appears, forged dark blue-grey steel with brighter honed edges as the iron palette, mild painted wood grain as the wood constant. Armor adds worn-by-no-one/no-mannequin to the orient line so Z-Image does not stage the piece on a body.
